steps.title: Use the graph to eliminate quickly
steps.content: All four choices have y-intercept $-1$, so do not spend time on the intercept. The graph falls from left to right, so the slope must be negative. That eliminates A and B immediately.

steps.title: Use the two marked points
steps.content: The marked points are $(0,-1)$ and $(8,-6)$. The slope is $$\frac{-6-(-1)}{8-0}=-\frac{5}{8},$$ and the $y$-intercept is $-1$. Therefore the equation is $f(x)=-\frac{5}{8}x-1$.

steps.title: Confirm with Desmos or the choices
steps.content: In Desmos, graph the four answer-choice lines and compare them with the image; only Choice C — $f(x)=-\frac{5}{8}x-1$ goes through both marked points. Choice D — $f(x)=-\frac{8}{5}x-1$ has the right negative sign, but its slope $-\frac{8}{5}$ is too steep. Therefore Choice C is correct.
